character.li_yan.name: Li Yan
character.su_qing.name: Su Qing
character.bai_zhi.name: Bai Zhi
skill.sword_qi.name: Sword Qi Slash
skill.sword_qi.desc: Melee: a slash of condensed sword qi strikes an adjacent foe.
skill.palm_wave.name: Cloud-Parting Palm
skill.palm_wave.desc: A palm strike of inner force hurls an adjacent foe back 2 tiles.
skill.flying_sword.name: Flying Sword
skill.flying_sword.desc: Ranged: command a flying sword in a straight line, up to 3 tiles.
skill.qi_shield.name: Guardian Qi
skill.qi_shield.desc: Circulate inner qi into a barrier that blocks the next hit.
skill.ghost_claw.name: Ghost Claw
skill.ghost_claw.desc: Melee: spectral claws rake an adjacent target.
skill.corpse_smash.name: Corpse Smash
skill.corpse_smash.desc: Melee: a crushing blow that also shoves the target back.
skill.spirit_bolt.name: Spirit Bolt
skill.spirit_bolt.desc: Ranged: a bolt of resentful qi fired from afar, up to 3 tiles.
skill.vine_lash.name: Vine Lash
skill.vine_lash.desc: Ranged: demonic vines lash out in a straight line, up to 4 tiles.
skill.wolf_bite.name: Wolf Bite
skill.wolf_bite.desc: Melee: a swift bite from an adjacent target.
skill.minor_heal.name: Lesser Spring Renewal
skill.minor_heal.desc: Restores 2 HP to the nearest ally in a straight line, up to 1 tile.
skill.major_heal.name: Greater Spring Renewal
skill.major_heal.desc: Restores 4 HP to the nearest ally in a straight line, up to 2 tiles.
monster.yin_ghost.name: Yin Ghost
monster.jiangshi.name: Jiangshi
monster.yuan_ling.name: Vengeful Spirit
monster.teng_yao.name: Vine Demon
monster.yao_lang.name: Demon Wolf
map.yanwu_ground.name: Sparring Grounds

map.demo3_wolf_woods.name: Wolfhowl Trail
map.demo4_mist_hollow.name: Miasma Hollow
ui.instruction_idle: Click a character, then click a highlighted tile to move, or a skill button below.
ui.instruction_armed: Click a highlighted tile to aim, or click the skill again to cancel.
ui.wave_cleared_hint: Wave cleared! Reinforcements haven't arrived yet — ending the turn just advances the clock, not the wave.
ui.last_wave_reminder: Final wave! You don't need to kill everything — survive the countdown with the base alive and you win.
ui.outcome_defeat: The base fell! Restarting from wave 1.
ui.outcome_victory: Held the line! Every wave survived.
tutorial.tut_ap_cost.name: Action Points
tutorial.tut_ap_cost.step1: Every hero has their own Action Point (AP) pool that refills each turn — moving AND casting skills both spend from this same pool.
tutorial.tut_ap_cost.step2: Li Yan steps forward — that costs 1 AP, no matter which direction.
tutorial.tut_ap_cost.step3: See the AP counter drop from 4 to 3 — every single step costs exactly 1 AP.
tutorial.tut_ap_cost.step4: Now Li Yan uses Sword Qi Slash on the ghost ahead.
tutorial.tut_ap_cost.step5: Sword Qi Slash costs 2 AP, not 1 — each skill's own cost is printed right on its button, so check it before you commit. Li Yan has spent 3 of 4 AP this turn.
tutorial.tut_ap_cost.step6: That's the whole AP system: one pool per hero, spent on movement and skills alike. Back to level select.
tutorial.tut_dot_terrain.name: Poison Mist Terrain
tutorial.tut_dot_terrain.step1: That green haze on the ground is poison mist — walking onto it is free, but if you're still standing on it when the turn ends, it ticks you for damage.
tutorial.tut_dot_terrain.step2: Li Yan steps forward into the mist.
tutorial.tut_dot_terrain.step3: There's a ghost standing on another patch of mist across the room — the mist doesn't care whose side you're on. Anyone still on it at turn's end takes the tick.
tutorial.tut_dot_terrain.step5: There it is — both Li Yan and the ghost took a flat 1 damage. It's never lethal on its own, but standing there wears you down. Lure a monster across it to grind them down, but crossing it yourself costs you the same toll. Back to level select.
tutorial.tut_healer.name: Using a Healer
tutorial.tut_healer.step1: Bai Zhi is the squad's healer, carrying Lesser and Greater Spring Renewal. Let's have Li Yan take a hit first, so you can see the healer actually earn her keep.
tutorial.tut_healer.step2: End turn — the jiangshi nearby jumps in and hits Li Yan.
tutorial.tut_healer.step3: Li Yan lost a good chunk of HP. Lesser Spring Renewal only reaches 1 tile and costs 1 AP for 2 HP; Greater Spring Renewal reaches 2 tiles and costs 3 AP for 4 HP — use the lesser one when you're close and only lightly hurt, save the greater one for when you're farther away or badly hurt. Li Yan's right here, so the lesser heal is enough.
tutorial.tut_healer.step4: Bai Zhi steps forward, next to Li Yan.
tutorial.tut_healer.step5: Bai Zhi casts Lesser Spring Renewal on Li Yan.
tutorial.tut_healer.step6: HP's back up — that's healing in a nutshell: check the distance and how much HP is missing, then pick the small heal or the big one accordingly. Back to level select.
tutorial.tut_opportunity_attack.name: Opportunity Attacks
tutorial.tut_opportunity_attack.step1: Watch what happens when you disengage from a monster you're standing right next to.
tutorial.tut_opportunity_attack.step2: Li Yan steps up next to the ghost.
tutorial.tut_opportunity_attack.step3: Now they're adjacent — right in the ghost's melee range.
tutorial.tut_opportunity_attack.step4: Li Yan strikes with Sword Qi Slash.
tutorial.tut_opportunity_attack.step5: The ghost is hurt but still alive. Now watch Li Yan try to back away...
tutorial.tut_opportunity_attack.step6: Li Yan steps back, breaking adjacency.
tutorial.tut_opportunity_attack.step7: There it is — the instant you break adjacency with a monster, it gets one free hit in. Finish it off or plan your retreat before you step away.
tutorial.tut_push_into_abyss.name: Push into the Abyss
tutorial.tut_push_into_abyss.step1: Cloud-Parting Palm doesn't just shove enemies back 2 tiles — near a hazard tile, that shove can be lethal.
tutorial.tut_push_into_abyss.step2: Li Yan strikes the ghost with Cloud-Parting Palm, sending it flying toward the abyss.
tutorial.tut_push_into_abyss.step3: The ghost hit the hazard tile and died instantly — monsters shoved into a hazard don't survive it, unlike a hero who's just hurt by it.
tutorial.tut_push_into_abyss.step4: Use the terrain: a well-aimed push can be a kill on its own. Back to level select.
